summary: SharePoint Folder Routing feature complete - All 20 backend tests pass, All 12 UI tests pass. Full CRUD operations for folder rules, vendor mappings, processor assignments working. Document routing suggestion engine correctly routes documents based on vendor, doc type, international status, and special conditions (dunnage, tooling, freight issues, credit memos, S&H).

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> - functional but could be cleaned up

critical_code_review_comments: SharePoint file move operation (move-to-sharepoint) is MOCKED in demo mode - Microsoft Graph API is simulated
Consider adding data-testid to table rows for more robust UI testing of vendor mappings
seed_data_creation: Used auto-seeded defaults: 37 folder rules, 31 vendor mappings, 6 processor assignments
context_for_next_testing_agent: SharePoint Folder Routing feature is fully functional. Router registered at /api/sharepoint-routing. Frontend page at /sharepoint-routing (SP Routing nav item). Key routing scenarios tested: Canpack → Dropship Not International/Canpack, dunnage → Canpack/Dunnage return freight, freight issues → Freight Issues, credit memos → Vendor Credit Memos, S&H → S&H folders, unknown → Miscellaneous.

GET /api/sharepoint-routing/folder-tree.returns: 37 rules, 15 top-level folders in tree structure

GET /api/sharepoint-routing/processor-as.returns: 6 processor assignments (Andy, Ellie, Meg, Rhonda, Aaron)

tested_scenarios: Canpack vendor → Dropship Not International Documents/Canpack
Ball dunnage credit → Vendor Credit Memos/Ball Dunnage
S&H approved → S&H Invoices Approved Documents/Andy to Process
Unknown document → Miscellaneous Documents/Misc Invoices - need approval

POST /api/sharepoint-routing/vendor-mapp.returns: Created mapping with vendor_pattern, folder_target, vendor_category

POST /api/sharepoint-routing/seed-defaul.returns: Re-seeds 37 rules, 31 vendor mappings, 6 processor assignments

features: 6 processor cards (Andy, Ellie, Meg, Rhonda, Aaron)
Result display with suggested folder and reason
